title: Salem readies 11 counting halls; postal ballots to be opened first
summary: Salem district administration has set up 11 counting halls for the assembly seats with separate enclosures for service voter and postal ballots, which will be taken up at 8 a.m. on May 4.

title: SAIL Salem Steel Plant resumes full export despatch after polling pause
summary: Salem Steel Plant has resumed full despatch of stainless steel coils with rakes moving to JNPA and Chennai ports, after a brief slowdown during the April 23 polling week.

title: Yercaud and Mettur strong rooms under drone surveillance
summary: The Salem police have introduced 24x7 drone surveillance over EVM strong rooms in Yercaud and Mettur, in addition to CCTV and armed CAPF guards, ahead of counting.

title: Hoax bomb threat triggers search at Salem collectorate
summary: Salem collector office received hoax bomb threat email; police and bomb squad conducted intensive searches with sniffer dogs, no explosives found.

title: Fourth bomb threat reported this year in Salem
summary: Authorities confirmed repeated hoax threats targeting Salem collectorate this year, prompting heightened vigilance and ongoing investigation into the source.

title: Bomb disposal squads deployed after threat alert
summary: Specialized bomb detection teams and sniffer dogs were deployed across Salem collectorate premises following threat, ensuring safety and clearing sensitive zones.

title: Collector inspects counting centre arrangements
summary: Salem district collector conducted inspection of vote counting centers, reviewing infrastructure, security arrangements and logistics ahead of counting process.

title: Final phase polling concludes across Tamil Nadu
summary: Voting concludes statewide including Salem constituencies, marking end of polling phase with focus shifting to counting preparations and political analysis.

title: Exit polls generate buzz across Salem
summary: Exit poll discussions dominate Salem political circles, indicating competitive race between major alliances and possible shifts in traditional voting patterns.

title: AIADMK faces crucial test in western districts
summary: Western Tamil Nadu including Salem seen as key battleground where AIADMK performance will influence overall state election outcome.

title: DMK alliance shows edge in projections
summary: Early exit poll trends suggest advantage for DMK-led alliance, though local factors in Salem may influence final results significantly.

title: Strict monitoring continues at EVM strong rooms
summary: Round-the-clock security continues at Salem EVM storage centers with CCTV surveillance and restricted access until counting day.

title: Police increase surveillance after threat incident
summary: Following bomb threat, Salem police intensified surveillance across government offices and key installations to prevent potential security risks.

title: Heatwave conditions persist in Salem region
summary: Salem continues to experience high temperatures nearing 40°C, raising health concerns and affecting daily routines across the district.

title: Heat-related illness risk rises in Salem
summary: Medical experts warn of increasing heatstroke cases due to prolonged exposure, advising hydration and limiting outdoor activities during peak hours.

title: Residents adjust routines amid extreme heat
summary: People in Salem shift daily schedules to early mornings and evenings to avoid harsh afternoon temperatures.

title: Traffic monitored near collectorate after alert
summary: Traffic movement around Salem collector office regulated temporarily during security checks following bomb threat to ensure smooth operations.

title: Authorities issue caution after hoax threat
summary: Officials urge public to remain calm and avoid panic after confirmation that bomb threat at Salem collectorate was a hoax.

title: Investigation launched into email threat source
summary: Cyber teams begin investigation to trace origin of threatening email sent to Salem collector office as part of ongoing security probe.

title: Government offices resume normal operations
summary: After security clearance, Salem collectorate resumed regular operations with reinforced monitoring and precautionary measures.

title: Security systems reviewed at key offices
summary: Authorities review surveillance and emergency response systems at Salem government buildings following repeated threat incidents.

title: Sniffer dogs deployed across premises
summary: Specially trained sniffer dogs conducted thorough checks at Salem collectorate premises ensuring no suspicious objects remained after threat alert.

title: Focus shifts to vote counting preparations
summary: With polling completed, Salem district officials focus on final preparations for vote counting scheduled in early May.

title: Regional leaders await exit poll outcomes
summary: Political leaders in Salem closely monitor exit poll results to assess performance and plan next steps ahead of official counting.

title: Police maintain high alert across district
summary: High alert continues across Salem with increased patrolling and monitoring at sensitive locations after threat incident.

title: Rising temperatures impact outdoor workers
summary: Extreme heat conditions continue to affect construction and daily wage workers across Salem, reducing productivity during daytime hours.

title: Hospitals stay prepared for summer surge
summary: Healthcare facilities in Salem remain on alert for increased cases of dehydration and heat-related illnesses during peak summer days.

title: Officials stress emergency preparedness
summary: District administration emphasizes readiness for emergencies and urges departments to respond swiftly to any security or weather-related incidents.
